name: Trifecta
author: emb417
description: A 3-screen cabinet theme optimized for portrait playfield with landscape backglass/DMD. Supports both images and videos in all 3 screens. Carousel style navigation. No Audio Support.
change_log:
v1.1.1: Fixed video preload bug
v1.1.0: Improved media loading for faster navigation
v1.0.0: Optimized for 3-screen cabinet with portrait playfield, video supported for all screens
